title: Workflow
subtitle: Experimental
emptyHint: Click the button above to create your first workflow
deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete workflow "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
endNodeInfo: End node outputs the final result
startNodeExists: Only one start node is allowed
promptHint: Use {{variable}} to reference upstream node outputs
variableHint: Use {{input}} to reference user input, {{variable}} for other variables
knowledgeBaseHint: Use {{input}} to reference user input as query
selectNodeHint: Select a node or connection to view properties
allowedToolsHint: Select tools this LLM node can call. Leave empty to disable tool calling
judgePromptHint: Describe the question to judge, use {{variable}} to reference variables
trueKeywordsHint: Judge as True if LLM response contains these words, separated by comma
llmJudgeInfo: LLM Judge node sends a question to LLM and determines true/false based on the response, used for workflow branching
